name: copilot-auto-keep
description: Automatically accepts GitHub Copilot Agent edits so you never see the Keep/Undo review UI. For people who use git as their undo system.

copilotAutoKeep.enabled.description: Automatically accept pending Copilot Agent edits.

copilotAutoKeep.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after the last edit signal before auto-accepting.

copilotAutoKeep.acceptCommand.description: Override the VS Code command ID used to accept all edits. Leave empty to use the default discovered for your VS Code version.

commands.title: Copilot Auto-Keep: Accept Pending Edits Now
